annotation_registration.feature_centres: manually transcribed from user cyan callouts after registration
annotation_registration.central_highland_edges: OpenCV fitted to original map pixels inside the user-annotated search corridor

semantics.annotation_arrows: location callouts only; no mandatory travel direction inferred
semantics.central_highland_step: only the most protruding point of the central highland edge
semantics.other_central_highland_edge: approximately 400 mm ledge, blocked by default
semantics.jump_exception: only robots/teams positively labelled jump_capable may use the 400 mm ledge as a candidate route
semantics.gate_boxes: telemetry tolerance zones, not physical CAD footprints
semantics.b5_r5_width_source: OpenCV Hough length of the central-highland internal white vertical line
semantics.trapezoid_highland_boundary: small platform around B7/B8 only; long road/slope boundary explicitly excluded

features.category_zh: 中央高地 400 mm 高差边缘
features.note: 用户确认为约 400 mm 高差；边界由 OpenCV 在原图上吸附提取。大部分学校不能直接上，仅对已确认具备跳跃能力的机器人开放。
